mapper.select: SELECT rp.role_id, rp.permission_id, rp.reg_id, rp.reg_dt, rp.chg_id, rp.chg_dt, rp.del_id, rp.del_dt, rp.del_yn FROM role_permission rp INNER JOIN role r ON rp.role_id = r.role_id INNER JOIN permission p ON rp.permission_id = p.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId}

SELECT rp.role_id, rp.permission_id, rp.reg_id, rp.reg_dt, rp.chg_id, rp.chg_dt, rp.del_id, rp.del_dt, rp.del_yn FROM role_permission rp INNER JOIN role r ON rp.role_id = r.role_id INNER JOIN permission p ON rp.permission_id = p.permission_id WHERE rp.permission_id = #{permissionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO role_permission ( role_id, permission_id, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn ) VALUES ( #{roleId}, #{permissionId}, #{regId}, COALESCE(#{regDt}, NOW()), #{chgId}, COALESCE(#{chgDt}, NOW()), #{delYn} )

INSERT INTO role_permission ( role_id, permission_id, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn ) VALUES
( #{rolePermission.roleId}, #{rolePermission.permissionId}, #{rolePermission.regId}, COALESCE(#{rolePermission.regDt}, NOW()), #{rolePermission.chgId}, COALESCE(#{rolePermission.chgDt}, NOW()), #{rolePermission.delYn} )
mapper.select: SELECT role_id, permission_id, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_id, del_dt, del_yn FROM role_permission INNER JOIN role r ON rp.role_id = r.role_id INNER JOIN permission p ON rp.permission_id = p.permission_id WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND permission_id = #{permissionId}

SELECT rp.role_id, rp.permission_id, rp.reg_id, rp.reg_dt, rp.chg_id, rp.chg_dt, rp.del_id, rp.del_dt, rp.del_yn FROM role_permission rp INNER JOIN role r ON rp.role_id = r.role_id INNER JOIN permission p ON rp.permission_id = p.permission_id ORDER BY rp.reg_dt DESC

SELECT rp.role_id, rp.permission_id, rp.reg_id, rp.reg_dt, rp.chg_id, rp.chg_dt, rp.del_id, rp.del_dt, rp.del_yn FROM role_permission rp INNER JOIN role r ON rp.role_id = r.role_id INNER JOIN permission p ON rp.permission_id = p.permission_id ORDER BY rp.reg_dt DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE role_permission SET del_yn = CASE
WHEN (role_id = #{item.roleId} AND permission_id = #{item.permissionId}) THEN #{item.delYn}
WHEN (role_id = #{item.roleId} AND permission_id = #{item.permissionId}) THEN del_yn
ELSE del_yn END, chg_id = CASE
WHEN (role_id = #{item.roleId} AND permission_id = #{item.permissionId}) THEN #{item.chgId}
WHEN (role_id = #{item.roleId} AND permission_id = #{item.permissionId}) THEN chg_id
ELSE chg_id END, chg_dt = CASE
WHEN (role_id = #{item.roleId} AND permission_id = #{item.permissionId}) THEN COALESCE(#{item.chgDt}, NOW())
WHEN (role_id = #{item.roleId} AND permission_id = #{item.permissionId}) THEN chg_dt
ELSE chg_dt END, del_id =
WHEN role_id = #{item.roleId} AND permission_id = #{item.permissionId} THEN NULL::uuid
WHEN role_id = #{item.roleId} AND permission_id = #{item.permissionId} THEN #{item.delId}
WHEN role_id = #{item.roleId} AND permission_id = #{item.permissionId} THEN del_id
, del_dt =
WHEN role_id = #{item.roleId} AND permission_id = #{item.permissionId} THEN NULL::timestamp
WHEN role_id = #{item.roleId} AND permission_id = #{item.permissionId} THEN #{item.delDt}
WHEN role_id = #{item.roleId} AND permission_id = #{item.permissionId} THEN del_dt
WHERE (role_id, permission_id) IN
(#{item.roleId}, #{item.permissionId})
mapper.select:
SELECT rp.role_id, rp.permission_id, rp.reg_id, rp.reg_dt, rp.chg_id, rp.chg_dt, rp.del_id, rp.del_dt, rp.del_yn FROM role_permission rp INNER JOIN role r ON rp.role_id = r.role_id INNER JOIN permission p ON rp.permission_id = p.permission_id WHERE (rp.role_id, rp.permission_id) IN
(#{rolePermission.roleId}, #{rolePermission.permissionId})
mapper.update:
UPDATE role_permission SET del_yn = CASE
WHEN (role_id = #{rolePermission.roleId} AND permission_id = #{rolePermission.permissionId}) THEN #{rolePermission.delYn}
WHEN (role_id = #{rolePermission.roleId} AND permission_id = #{rolePermission.permissionId}) THEN del_yn
ELSE del_yn END, chg_id = CASE
WHEN (role_id = #{rolePermission.roleId} AND permission_id = #{rolePermission.permissionId}) THEN #{rolePermission.chgId}
WHEN (role_id = #{rolePermission.roleId} AND permission_id = #{rolePermission.permissionId}) THEN chg_id
ELSE chg_id END, chg_dt = CASE
WHEN (role_id = #{rolePermission.roleId} AND permission_id = #{rolePermission.permissionId}) THEN COALESCE(#{rolePermission.chgDt}, NOW())
WHEN (role_id = #{rolePermission.roleId} AND permission_id = #{rolePermission.permissionId}) THEN NOW()
ELSE chg_dt END, del_id = CASE
WHEN (role_id = #{rolePermission.roleId} AND permission_id = #{rolePermission.permissionId}) THEN #{rolePermission.delId}
WHEN (role_id = #{rolePermission.roleId} AND permission_id = #{rolePermission.permissionId}) THEN del_id
ELSE del_id END, del_dt = CASE
WHEN (role_id = #{rolePermission.roleId} AND permission_id = #{rolePermission.permissionId}) THEN COALESCE(#{rolePermission.delDt}, NOW())
WHEN (role_id = #{rolePermission.roleId} AND permission_id = #{rolePermission.permissionId}) THEN NOW()
ELSE del_dt END WHERE (role_id, permission_id) IN
(#{rolePermission.roleId}, #{rolePermission.permissionId})
